name: Zombie Apocalypse RPG
description: The world has fallen into chaos as the dead rise to feed on the living. You are a survivor, navigating this grim new reality. One year into the zombie apocalypse, you and your close-knit group of friends have managed to establish a secure shelter with beds, plantations and medical place, but threat from a zombies and rival survivor groups might force you to make difficult choices to ensure your survival and protect your makeshift haven. Will you embrace the darkness or try to find a peacefull way? Your choices and actions will shape your destiny in this post-apocalyptic world. Can you survive the zombie apocalypse and find a glimmer of hope?
creator: knoxisrogue
